item.title: 👍💵Stacy Dym - The Arc of Washington State
item.description: Stacy Dym signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent The Arc of Washington State. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Chloe Merino - Disability Rights Washington
item.description: Chloe Merino signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Disability Rights Washington. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.
item.description: Referred to Rules 2 Review.

item.title: 1st substitute bill substituted.
item.description: 1st substitute bill substituted.

item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: 👍Cathy Murahashi - The Arc of Washington
item.description: Cathy Murahashi signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent The Arc of Washington.

item.title: First reading, referred to Human Services.
item.description: First reading, referred to Human Services.

item.title: House Passes Rep. Farivar’s Bills to Expand Food Access, Update Disability Facility Names, & Strengthen Transparency in RHC’s – Washington State House Democrats
item.description: News article "House Passes Rep. Farivar’s Bills to Expand Food Access, Update Disability Facility Names, & Strengthen Transparency in RHC’s – Washington State House Democrats" from House Democrats.

item.title: 👍💵Chloe Merino - Disability Rights Washington
item.description: Chloe Merino signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Disability Rights Washington. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍SHAWN LATHAM - Self Advocates In Leadership
item.description: SHAWN LATHAM signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Self Advocates In Leadership.

item.title: 👍💵Noah Seidel - Office of Developmental Disabilities Ombuds
item.description: Noah Seidel signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Office of Developmental Disabilities Ombuds. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Placed on second reading consent calendar.

item.title: Committee amendment(s) adopted with no other amendments.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
